description: domainsdb.info provides a searchable database of registered internet domains and related statistics and update feeds. It lets users look up domains by text, TLD, and other filters, and retrieve recent additions, deletions, and TLD metadata.
summary: domainsdb.info exposes one HTTP REST API, the Domains-Index API, documented at https://domainsdb.info/docs with an OpenAPI spec mirrored by APIs.guru; it authenticates with a self-issued API key passed as the `api_key` query parameter.
